purpose: Holistic Capital Radar architecture and evidence coverage audit.

layers.label: Macro Reading
layers.role: Integrate Egg, Command Center, and confirmation signals into one regime read.
layers.visual_authority: one integrated macro read; Egg remains as framework graphic

lenses.label: Broad market regime
lenses.read: Broad regime supports holding core risk.
lenses.action: Hold core; add only at ruled zones.

lenses.label: Rate-cycle pressure
lenses.read: Bond weakness keeps rate pressure on valuations.

lenses.label: Volatility confirmation
lenses.read: Volatility confirms or contradicts price trend.

blocks: Rate pressure constrains duration/growth multiple expansion.
Growth leadership is extended/mixed; require pullback or confirmation.
promotes: Broad market trend supports holding core exposure.

action_protocol.condition: Only inside ruled buy zones with source tier AUTH/PARTIAL and evidence score high.
Maintain core holdings while route is not defensive and holding remains above stop/review zone.
Trim weak beta or concentration when price enters trim zones or route deteriorates.
Candidate must match active route and pass evidence/valuation/asymmetry gates.
Activate if SPX loses defense line or VIX enters stress.

market_focus.summary: Index Ballast / Liquidity Beta is currently mixed inside the market-orientation model; this defines macro direction before ticker selection.
AI Compute Expansion is currently mixed inside the market-orientation model; this defines macro direction before ticker selection.
Streaming / Attention Stack is currently mixed inside the market-orientation model; this defines macro direction before ticker selection.
Bitcoin Financialization is currently stressed inside the market-orientation model; this defines macro direction before ticker selection.

market_worries.summary: Risk monitor: Crowded momentum without infrastructure support. This can constrain or invalidate the current macro-direction thesis if confirmed by live tape or source evidence.
Risk monitor: Narrative-only speculation lacking capital confirmation. This can constrain or invalidate the current macro-direction thesis if confirmed by live tape or source evidence.
Risk monitor: AI capex materially contracts. This can constrain or invalidate the current macro-direction thesis if confirmed by live tape or source evidence.
Risk monitor: Credit stress expands rapidly. This can constrain or invalidate the current macro-direction thesis if confirmed by live tape or source evidence.

market_worries.risk: Liquidity regime deteriorates faster than infrastructure demand can compensate
market_worries.summary: Risk monitor: Liquidity regime deteriorates faster than infrastructure demand can compensate. This can constrain or invalidate the current macro-direction thesis if confirmed by live tape or source evidence.

global_finance_shift.summary: Structural pressure remains concentrated around AI infrastructure, power systems, digital treasury rails, and quality financial infrastructure while liquidity-sensitive beta remains regime-dependent.

directional_thesis.base_case: Structural pressure remains concentrated around AI infrastructure, power systems, digital treasury rails, and quality financial infrastructure while liquidity-sensitive beta remains regime-dependent.
directional_thesis.bull_case: Market rewards Infrastructure beneficiaries with durable demand pull; Second-order AI systems and power bottlenecks; Financial rails benefiting from digitization and treasury transition.
directional_thesis.bear_case: Thesis weakens if AI capex materially contracts; Credit stress expands rapidly; Liquidity regime deteriorates faster than infrastructure demand can compensate.

what_changed_since_last_cycle.change: No material macro-direction change detected this cycle.

evidence.extracted_insight: 10Y yield input is 4.57, shaping duration sensitivity, liquidity interpretation, and risk-asset permission.

evidence.source_name: FRED - ICE BofA US High Yield Option-Adjusted Spread
evidence.extracted_insight: High-yield OAS input is 2.72, acting as a credit-stress check against risk-on interpretation.

evidence.source_name: Yahoo Finance chart API (public/unofficial; 1m intraday when available)
evidence.extracted_insight: SPY tape input shows price 759.63 and day change 0.14%, used to test whether live market pressure confirms or contradicts the landscape thesis.

evidence.source_name: Yahoo Finance chart API (public/unofficial; 1m intraday when available)
evidence.extracted_insight: QQQ tape input shows price 746.06 and day change 0.45%, used to test whether live market pressure confirms or contradicts the landscape thesis.

evidence.extracted_insight: VIX tape input shows price 15.78 and day change -1.68%, used to test whether live market pressure confirms or contradicts the landscape thesis.

evidence.extracted_insight: BTC-USD tape input shows price 66887.68 and day change 0.33%, used to test whether live market pressure confirms or contradicts the landscape thesis.

layers.label: Market Execution Map
layers.role: Keep the current Decision Map; enrich it with evidence and scenario justification.
layers.visual_authority: current Decision Map remains primary market execution graphic

real: SPX daily OHLCV from market data adapter
estimated: action bands derived from moving averages and retracement structure
projected: two-quarter scenario paths are conditional rule maps, not forecasts

brief.change_trigger: Add-review only on controlled pullback/reclaim above 7,216–7,454; defense below 6,642.
brief.risk_trigger: Break below 200D 6,848 with VIX expansion shifts posture defensive.

confirmations.name: Momentum
confirmations.why: RSI identifies whether trend is overextended or losing momentum.

confirmations.name: Volatility
confirmations.why: VIX confirms whether price strength is supported by calm volatility.

confirmations.name: Rates
confirmations.why: 10Y yield pressure constrains valuation multiples, especially growth.

confirmations.name: Growth proxy
confirmations.why: QQQ confirms whether index strength is growth-led or broad-market only.

scenarios.label: Bull path
scenarios.trigger: SPX holds 50D; VIX remains contained; rates/liquidity do not tighten further

scenarios.label: Base path
scenarios.trigger: SPX remains above 200D but chops around 20D/50D; no broad valuation reset

scenarios.label: Correction path
scenarios.trigger: SPX loses 50D and VIX expands; defense line becomes active

annotated_events.label: NOW
annotated_events.note: Latest SPX close from market adapter

strategy_rules.condition: SPX remains above 7,216 and VIX stays contained
strategy_rules.action: Maintain core equity; no broad chase.

strategy_rules.condition: Controlled pullback into 7,216–7,454 or reclaim after brief break
strategy_rules.action: Add selectively to strongest regime-supported holdings.

strategy_rules.condition: Push into 7,496–7,876 with weak breadth or sentiment stretch

strategy_rules.action: Raise cash, stop adding, reset opportunity list.

buckets.label: Index / market beta
buckets.description: Broad market index exposure used as portfolio beta and ballast.
buckets.interpretation: Index / market beta exposure is near its 55% review cap; additions require stronger confirmation and substitution logic.

buckets.label: E-commerce / cloud infrastructure
buckets.description: Amazon-specific exposure: e-commerce, AWS, advertising, logistics, and operating leverage.
buckets.interpretation: E-commerce / cloud infrastructure exposure is inside cap but contains 1 review-sensitive holding(s).

buckets.label: Speculative crypto infrastructure
buckets.description: High-volatility crypto/mining/infrastructure optionality requiring explicit thesis review.
buckets.interpretation: Speculative crypto infrastructure exposure is over its 5% review cap; capital additions should be blocked until rebalanced or explicitly approved.

buckets.label: Digital ads / AI platform
buckets.description: Advertising, social platform, AI infrastructure, and metaverse optionality exposure.
buckets.interpretation: Digital ads / AI platform exposure is inside cap but contains 1 review-sensitive holding(s).

buckets.label: Streaming / media
buckets.description: Subscription entertainment and media platform exposure.
buckets.interpretation: Streaming / media exposure is inside cap but contains 1 review-sensitive holding(s).

buckets.label: Payments / financial infrastructure
buckets.description: Global payment network and transaction infrastructure exposure.

buckets.label: Levered / tactical products

diagnostics.note: Weak-data exposure is a diagnostic overlay, not an exposure bucket; exclusive business buckets reconcile to portfolio weight.

layers.label: Opportunity Research Engine
layers.role: Rebuild Opportunity from ranking table into evidence-backed research dossiers.
layers.visual_authority: opportunity cards should show evidence gates, thesis, blockers, and upgrade/reject logic

evidence_checks.purpose: Opportunity engine uses numeric evidence gates. Normal promotion requires evidence >=80. Evidence 60-79 is only passable for high-conviction undervaluation exceptions.

opportunity_clusters.macro_theme_summary: Index Ballast / Liquidity Beta is currently mixed inside the market-orientation model; this defines macro direction before ticker selection.
opportunity_clusters.second_order_direction: AI infrastructure pressure moves into power, grid, construction, and equipment bottlenecks.

candidate_tickers.name: Palantir
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for PLTR.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: A controversial but interesting candidate: if AI shifts from model infrastructure to operational deployment, PLTR may be a pure workflow/ontology beneficiary.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: meaningful pullback; possible research entry setup only after evidence and support confirmation
invalidation_questions: Risk to invalidate/check: Government/commercial concentration debates

candidate_tickers.name: Vertiv
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for VRT.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: Infrastructure-side exposure to AI/data-center buildout: power, cooling, and uptime constraints rather than model/platform winners.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: neutral price context; compare against thesis and valuation evidence
invalidation_questions: Risk to invalidate/check: Execution and margin pressure
Risk to invalidate/check: Industrial cyclicality if capex slows

candidate_tickers.name: Eaton
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for ETN.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: A less flashy but potentially higher-quality way to express the grid/data-center power constraint without owning only the hottest AI names.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: neutral price context; compare against thesis and valuation evidence

candidate_tickers.name: Oklo
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for OKLO.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: Highly experimental asymmetric optionality on advanced nuclear power. This belongs in the creative lab, not the core portfolio, unless evidence improves dramatically.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: relative strength / momentum; avoid chasing until base or catalyst confirmed

candidate_tickers.name: Nextracker
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for NXT.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: More experimental energy-infrastructure idea: not just AI power demand, but grid-edge hardware and utility-scale solar deployment efficiency.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: neutral price context; compare against thesis and valuation evidence
invalidation_questions: Risk to invalidate/check: Policy and tariff risk

candidate_tickers.name: Quanta Services
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for PWR.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: A picks-and-shovels candidate for the physical grid buildout needed by electrification, data centers, and energy transition.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: neutral price context; compare against thesis and valuation evidence
invalidation_questions: Risk to invalidate/check: Utility capex timing

candidate_tickers.name: Rocket Lab
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for RKLB.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: A creative industrial-space candidate: asymmetric if launch cadence, defense/customer demand, and satellite systems compound into infrastructure status.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: neutral price context; compare against thesis and valuation evidence
invalidation_questions: Risk to invalidate/check: High beta market sensitivity

candidate_tickers.name: GE Vernova
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for GEV.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: A creative infrastructure candidate for the electricity scarcity layer: grid hardware, gas turbines, and electrification may be a more durable AI-adjacent bottleneck than another software/platform add.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: neutral price context; compare against thesis and valuation evidence
invalidation_questions: Risk to invalidate/check: Crowding after power-theme enthusiasm

candidate_tickers.name: TransMedics
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for TMDX.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: A genuinely different growth infrastructure idea: organ transplant logistics and preservation network effects, far from current AI/platform concentration.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: neutral price context; compare against thesis and valuation evidence
invalidation_questions: Risk to invalidate/check: Small/mid-cap valuation risk

candidate_tickers.name: Dynatrace
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for DT.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: Profitable SaaS platform at 25x FCF with 18.8% revenue growth and $530M annual free cash flow — the closest analog to ServiceNow's profile from a week ago. As AI makes software architectures more complex and distributed, cloud observability becomes mandatory enterprise infrastructure rather than optional tooling. Dynatrace serves the large-enterprise end that Datadog hasn't fully penetrated, and its valuation has reset significantly relative to peers (DDOG trades at 86x FCF, CRWD at 144x).
invalidation_questions: Risk to invalidate/check: Datadog competition in mid-market and cloud-native accounts
Risk to invalidate/check: Sales cycle elongation in enterprise IT budget freezes
Risk to invalidate/check: Multiple re-compression if growth decelerates below 15%

candidate_tickers.name: Beta Technologies
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for BETA.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: Asymmetric optionality on aviation electrification: $36M revenue growing 136% YoY, $0.7B market cap. Beta is building the charging infrastructure and power network for electric aircraft before the planes exist at scale — similar positioning to early EV charging networks. The differentiated angle is infrastructure-first rather than aircraft-first. If electric aviation timelines compress, the network effect on charging infrastructure could be substantial. Speculative tier alongside OKLO — not a core position, but a legitimate asymmetric bet with a differentiated thesis.
invalidation_questions: Risk to invalidate/check: Pre-commercial: cash burn $313M with only $36M revenue
Risk to invalidate/check: Electric aviation regulatory timelines may push 5-10 years
Risk to invalidate/check: Extreme dilution risk if fundraising at distressed terms

candidate_tickers.name: The Trade Desk
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for TTD.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: The cheapest name in the enterprise-SaaS/platform cohort at 12.7x FCF for 18.5% revenue growth — trading at a steep discount because of a significant earnings miss in late 2024 that damaged management credibility. If that was an execution stumble rather than a structural problem, the asymmetry is real: CTV advertising is still growing, programmatic is becoming AI-driven, and TTD is the dominant independent DSP with no platform conflict of interest (unlike Google/Amazon). Evidence-gated: requires confirmation that the miss was one-time before promotion.
invalidation_questions: Risk to invalidate/check: Late-2024 earnings miss may signal structural rather than one-time problem
Risk to invalidate/check: Google/Amazon DSP competition in programmatic
Risk to invalidate/check: Advertising cyclicality in macro slowdown

candidate_tickers.name: Cameco
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for CCJ.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: A creative non-AI software expression of the power scarcity thesis: nuclear fuel exposure if electricity demand and energy security remain structurally important.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: relative strength / momentum; avoid chasing until base or catalyst confirmed

Dynatrace serves the large-enterprise end that Datadog hasn't fully penetrated, and its valuation has reset significantly relative to peers (DDOG trades at 86x FCF, CRWD at 144x).

packets.name: Beta Technologies
packets.whyInteresting: Asymmetric optionality on aviation electrification: $36M revenue growing 136% YoY, $0.7B market cap. Beta is building the charging infrastructure and power network for electric aircraft before the planes exist at scale — similar positioning to early EV charging networks. The differentiated angle is infrastructure-first rather than aircraft-first. If electric aviation timelines compress, the network effect on charging infrastructure could be substantial. Speculative tier alongside OKLO — not a core position, but a legitimate asymmetric bet with a differentiated thesis.
whyNow: In Opportunity Scout with long_term_macro_fit classification.

evidenceRefs.use: internal candidate thesis and current quote context
required next primary-source filing check before promotion

confirmBeforePromotion: Cash runway extends beyond 24 months or funding round de-risks burn
Aircraft certification progress at partner OEMs (United Airlines, Air New Zealand deals)
Charging network installations are growing, not just contracts signed
invalidationQuestions: Risk to invalidate/check: Pre-commercial: cash burn $313M with only $36M revenue
Risk to invalidate/check: Electric aviation regulatory timelines may push 5-10 years
Risk to invalidate/check: Extreme dilution risk if fundraising at distressed terms
missingForPromotion: defined add zone and invalidation level

packets.sourceBoundary: Local/public/internal evidence only. No web_search, no fresh news causality claim.

packets.name: The Trade Desk
packets.whyInteresting: The cheapest name in the enterprise-SaaS/platform cohort at 12.7x FCF for 18.5% revenue growth — trading at a steep discount because of a significant earnings miss in late 2024 that damaged management credibility. If that was an execution stumble rather than a structural problem, the asymmetry is real: CTV advertising is still growing, programmatic is becoming AI-driven, and TTD is the dominant independent DSP with no platform conflict of interest (unlike Google/Amazon). Evidence-gated: requires confirmation that the miss was one-time before promotion.
whyNow: TTD: The cheapest name in the enterprise-SaaS/platform cohort at 12.7x FCF for 18.5% revenue growth — trading at a steep discount because of a significant earnings miss in late 2024 that damaged management credibility. Evidence-gated: requires confirmation that the miss was one-time before promotion.

layers.label: Evidence / Source / Trust Engine
layers.role: Validate source quality, freshness, and support level behind strategy claims.
layers.visual_authority: quiet audit layer; not a dominant homepage section unless needed for trust

evidence_checks.policy: Sources can discover opportunities, but candidate promotion requires primary evidence, freshness, invalidation, price zone, risk budget, and portfolio role.

sources.name: Capital Radar live state snapshot
sources.failureMode: blocks live action permissions when stale or missing
sources.promotionPolicy: Can support context; promotion still needs primary evidence or independent confirmation.

sources.name: Yahoo public chart endpoint
sources.failureMode: prices may be stale or unofficial; freshness gate required before action
sources.promotionPolicy: Do not use for promotion; sentiment/background only.

sources.name: FRED public macro, rates, and credit series
sources.failureMode: macro regime confidence reduced if stale/missing
sources.promotionPolicy: Can support facts and action-gate inputs when fresh.

sources.name: SEC company submissions JSON
sources.failureMode: filing evidence unavailable; thesis promotions blocked if primary-source evidence missing
sources.promotionPolicy: Can support facts and action-gate inputs when fresh.

sources.name: Company investor relations pages
sources.failureMode: source-specific; blocked/JS-heavy pages require alternate primary source
sources.promotionPolicy: Can support context; promotion still needs primary evidence or independent confirmation.

sources.name: ETF holdings and sector exposure pages
sources.promotionPolicy: Can support context; promotion still needs primary evidence or independent confirmation.

sources.name: Curated public RSS / source feeds
sources.failureMode: event causality remains unresolved; no final claims from blocked/low-quality extraction
sources.promotionPolicy: Do not use for promotion; sentiment/background only.

sources.name: Capital Radar internal archive and run logs
sources.failureMode: learning loop impaired; current action gates unaffected
sources.promotionPolicy: Can support facts and action-gate inputs when fresh.

sources.name: Yahoo Finance RSS headline feed (materiality-scored)
sources.failureMode: news gate inactive; HIGH-materiality promotion evidence unavailable
sources.promotionPolicy: Do not use for promotion; sentiment/background only.

sources.name: SEC EDGAR XBRL company-facts API
sources.failureMode: fundamentals absent; holding and candidate valuation evidence thin
sources.promotionPolicy: Can support facts and action-gate inputs when fresh.

taxonomy_coverage.label: Macro regime
decision_questions: Is policy easing, restrictive, or transitioning?
Are inflation and real rates supportive or hostile to duration assets?
Does the macro regime support risk expansion or capital preservation?

taxonomy_coverage.label: Liquidity and credit
decision_questions: Is liquidity expanding or contracting?
Is credit stress contained or rising?
Does liquidity permit speculative risk or only quality exposure?

taxonomy_coverage.label: Market structure
decision_questions: Is the rally broad or narrow?
Is volatility confirming or contradicting price?
Is the market extended, constructive, fragile, or breaking?

taxonomy_coverage.label: Sector and theme rotation
decision_questions: Which sectors are leading and why?
Is a theme supported by real capex/earnings or only narrative?
Which themes deserve promotion, watch, or rejection?

taxonomy_coverage.label: Ticker fundamentals
decision_questions: Is the business improving or deteriorating?
Is growth high quality or capital intensive?
Does the balance sheet support risk-taking?

taxonomy_coverage.label: Valuation and expectations
decision_questions: What expectations are embedded in the price?
Is valuation justified by growth and margins?
Is the setup asymmetric or merely expensive momentum?

taxonomy_coverage.label: Ticker catalysts
decision_questions: What event can change the thesis?
Is the catalyst already priced in?
Does the catalyst justify action now or only monitoring?

taxonomy_coverage.label: Technical entry and risk boundary
decision_questions: Is this a good company at a good entry?
Where is the controlled add zone?
Where is the thesis wrong or timing invalidated?

taxonomy_coverage.label: Portfolio context
decision_questions: Does this action improve the portfolio or increase concentration risk?
Is the position already large enough?
What size is permitted under the current market regime?

recommendations: Integrate Egg, Command Center, and confirmation signals into Macro Reading instead of rendering them as separate authority sources.
Keep Decision Map and Price Zone Radar as primary graphics; add evidence support rather than replacing them.
Rebuild Opportunity around evidence packets, valuation/fundamental fields, and upgrade/reject gates.
Make OpenClaw collect or validate missing ticker fundamentals, valuation, capex, catalyst, and source-reliability fields.
Use the homepage as a daily operating note; keep deeper evidence in linked dossiers and audit artifacts.
